common.loadErrorHint: Check your connection and try again.

empty.favorites: Mark a channel as favorite to see it here.

whoIsWatching.title: Who's watching?
whoIsWatching.loadFailedHint: El servidor no devolvió ningún perfil para esta cuenta. Pulsa reintentar; si persiste, cierra sesión y vuelve a entrar.
whoIsWatching.subtitle: Selecciona tu perfil para continuar.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Pick a new password for your account.
changePassword.subtitleForced: Before you continue, replace the temporary password with one only you know.
changePassword.alsoVerifyOld: I'd like to also type my current password
changePassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
changePassword.errorGeneric: Could not change password. Please try again.

home.failedToLoad: Failed to load content. Check your server connection.

link.title: Link a device
link.subtitle: Type the code shown on your TV, console or other device to authorise it on your account.
link.codeHint: Eight letters and numbers, dashes optional. Codes expire 10 minutes after the device requested them.
link.success: Device approved. The device should sign in within a few seconds.
link.errorUnknown: We don't recognise this code. Check what's on the device and try again.
link.errorExpired: This code has expired. Ask the device to start over.
link.errorAlreadyApproved: This code was already approved by another user.
link.errorAccountDisabled: Your account is disabled. Contact your administrator.

linked.title: Linked devices
linked.subtitle: Devices you have already authorised here. Sign one out if you lent it or no longer use it.

pair.title: Link this device
pair.subtitle: Scan the QR code with the phone where you are already signed in, or visit /link on another device and enter this code.
pair.qrAlt: QR code to link this device
pair.verificationHint: Visit {{url}} on another device where you are already signed in.
pair.expired: The code expired or was approved from another device. Generate a new one to keep linking.
pair.errorGeneric: We couldn't start the pairing. Please try again.
pair.footer: The code expires after 10 minutes. Once approved, this device will sign in automatically.

peers.title: Connected servers
peers.subtitle: Libraries your friends have shared with you. Each card is a remote library — click to browse its catalog.
peers.emptyHint: You haven't paired any HubPlay server yet. Head to Admin → Federation to generate or accept an invite.
peers.allEmpty: You have paired servers, but none have shared libraries with you yet. Ask their admin to enable some from their federation panel.
peers.librariesSubtitle: Libraries the admin of this server has chosen to share with you.
peers.noShares: This server hasn't shared any library with you yet. Ask their admin to grant access from their federation panel.
peers.emptyLibrary: No titles visible. The remote admin may have removed the browse scope, or the library is empty.
peers.cacheHint: You're seeing locally cached content because the peer is not reachable right now. Refresh when it comes back online.
peers.itemNotFoundDescription: We couldn't find this title in the peer's catalog. It may have been removed or the share scope changed.
peers.noSharesTitle: Este servidor aún no comparte nada contigo

watchTonight.resume: Pick up where you left off

login.errorAccessExpired: Tu acceso temporal ha caducado. Contacta con el administrador del servidor para extenderlo.
login.errorAccountDisabled: Tu cuenta está desactivada. Contacta con el administrador del servidor.
login.errorRateLimited: Demasiados intentos. Espera unos minutos e inténtalo de nuevo.

filters.title: Filters
filters.noGenres: No genres available yet — finish a scan to populate.

search.title: Search
search.emptyDescription: Type in the topbar search to find content.

collectionDetail.notFoundDescription: This saga doesn't exist or has no content in your library.
collectionDetail.noItems: No movies from this saga in your library.

collections.title: Collections
collections.emptyDescription: When you scan movies with TMDb metadata, sagas (Star Wars, MCU, ...) will appear here automatically.

studioDetail.notFoundDescription: This studio doesn't exist or has no content in your library yet.
studioDetail.noItems: No titles from this studio in your library.

personDetail.notFoundDescription: This person doesn't exist or has been removed.
personDetail.noFilmography: No titles associated with this person in your library.

itemDetail.notFoundDescription: The item you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
itemDetail.playbackError: Failed to start playback. Please try again.

liveTV.title: Live TV
liveTV.formatNotSupported: This channel format is not supported in your browser.
liveTV.noSimilar: No similar channels in this library.
liveTV.importDescription: Import free public IPTV channels from the iptv-org community project.
liveTV.detectedCountry: We detected you might be in {{flag}} {{country}}
liveTV.importFailed: Failed to import channels. Please try again.
liveTV.favoritesEmpty: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any channel to add it.
liveTV.apagadosSubtitle: Canales con fallos recientes; reintenta, quizá hayan vuelto.

hero.customiseHint: Se guarda en tu cuenta para todos tus dispositivos.

option.liveNowHint: Canales con programa EPG emitiendo ahora mismo.
option.newestHint: Los últimos canales que entraron en la biblioteca.
option.offHint: Discover empieza directamente por las rails.

liveTV.noLiveNowMatch: Ningún canal en directo coincide con la búsqueda.
liveTV.noLiveNowInCategory: No hay canales en directo en esta categoría ahora mismo.
liveTV.noLiveNowAtAll: No hay canales emitiendo ahora mismo.
liveTV.noLiveNowHint: Si acabas de añadir canales, su guía EPG aún se está descargando. Puedes revisar las fuentes EPG en Bibliotecas.
liveTV.noLiveNow: No hay canales emitiendo en este momento.

notFound.subtitle: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

settings.title: Settings

homeLayout.title: Customise home
homeLayout.intro: Reorder and toggle the sections that appear on your Home page. Changes save instantly and only affect your account.

playback.title: Playback
playback.trailersDescription: Plays a muted trailer over the backdrop a few seconds after a movie or series detail page opens. Disable to keep the static artwork only.
playback.audioLangDescription: Si el archivo tiene una pista en este idioma, el reproductor la usará automáticamente.
playback.subtitleLangDescription: Si hay subtítulos en este idioma, se activarán al empezar la reproducción.

settings.goToAdmin: Go to Administration to add one.
settings.metadataHint: After saving a TMDB API key, run a library scan to fetch metadata, posters, and backdrops for your media. New items will be automatically enriched during future scans.
settings.pathInaccessibleHint: One or more paths aren't accessible. Check the volume is mounted correctly in docker-compose.yml and that the path matches the container mount point.

tmdb.label: TMDB (The Movie Database)
tmdb.description: Posters, backdrops, synopses, ratings, cast & crew

devices.empty: No hay sesiones activas en este momento.
devices.revokeSelfConfirm: Vas a cerrar la sesión de este mismo dispositivo. Te tocará volver a iniciar sesión. ¿Continuar?
devices.title: Tus dispositivos
devices.subtitle: Cada inicio de sesión queda guardado aquí. Cierra una sesión si no reconoces el dispositivo o pierdes el móvil.

federation.title: Connected servers
federation.subtitle: Pair your HubPlay with a friend's so you can share libraries and TV channels with admin-controlled scopes. Each server stays sovereign — pairing is peer-to-peer and revocable any time.

identity.heading: My server
identity.name: Name
identity.fingerprintHint: Read this fingerprint to the other server's admin out of band (chat, voice). It must match exactly what they see when they probe your URL — that match is the guarantee there's no MITM in between.
identity.wordsHint: Short word list for voice confirmation. Useful on the phone when chat is unreliable: 'my fingerprint starts with aardvark, barbados…'.

invite.heading: Generate invite
invite.description: Mint a one-shot code (24h validity) and share it with the other admin via a secure channel. They will paste it into their UI to complete the handshake.

accept.heading: Pair with another server
accept.description: If another admin has sent you an invite, accept it here. First enter their server URL and click Probe — you'll see their fingerprint. Confirm it matches what they told you BEFORE clicking Pair.
accept.confirm: I confirm this fingerprint matches the one the other admin read or sent me

peers.heading: Paired servers
peers.empty: No paired servers yet. Generate an invite or paste one above to get started.
peers.revokeConfirm: Revoke pairing with {{name}}? All future sessions will be rejected and the peer will need to re-handshake if you want to reconnect.
peers.emptyTitle: Aún no has emparejado con nadie
peers.emptyHint: Genera un invite y compártelo con otro admin, o pega aquí el invite que te hayan enviado. El handshake es directo entre servidores y revocable en cualquier momento.

shares.heading: Libraries shared with {{name}}
shares.hint: Tick "Shared" to let the peer see and play that library. The extra scopes (Play / Download / Live TV) can be tuned per library. Changes save automatically.
shares.noLibraries: You have no local libraries yet. Create one under the Libraries tab before sharing.

summary.thisWeekSubtitle: Tiempo total visualizado y los títulos que más arrastran.
summary.catalogueSubtitle: Tamaño del catálogo y de la base de datos.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.nowPlayingComingSoonHint: This panel will list every active stream — user, content, device, bandwidth — with a button to stop a session.
dashboard.nowPlayingEmptyHint: Active streams will appear here as soon as someone starts playing.
dashboard.nowPlayingErrorHint: Refresh the page or check the server logs.
dashboard.inventoryEmptyHint: Add your first library to start scanning movies, series or live TV.

activity.sessionsComingSoonHint: Real-time list of every viewer connected to the server.
activity.tasksComingSoonHint: Unified view of every cron job (M3U refresh, EPG, library scans) with run-now and last-run timestamps.
activity.logsComingSoonHint: Tail the last server log lines without leaving the admin.

advanced.warning: Actions in this section affect every user. Proceed with care.

libraries.title: Media Libraries
libraries.name: Name
libraries.scanStarted: Scan started. The library will update in the background.
libraries.refreshMetadataTooltip: Re-fetch metadata and images from providers
libraries.noLibrariesHint: Add a media library to get started.
libraries.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This will remove the library and all associated metadata. Media files on disk will not be affected.
libraries.languageFilterEmpty: Sin selección: se importan todos los idiomas (comportamiento por defecto).
libraries.languageFilterHint: Solo se persisten canales cuyo tvg-language, tvg-country, group-title o nombre coincida.
libraries.refreshM3UFailed: No se pudo refrescar el M3U.
libraries.refreshEPGFailed: No se pudo refrescar la guía EPG.
libraries.noEPGURL: No hay URL EPG configurada en esta biblioteca.
libraries.detailNotAvailable: No hay configuración avanzada para este tipo
libraries.detailNotAvailableHint: Las acciones diarias (escanear, actualizar metadatos / imágenes, editar) están en la lista. Esta vista de detalle existe sobre todo para bibliotecas en directo.
libraries.epgURLHint: Si el M3U trae url-tvg en su cabecera, se auto-detecta.

errors.livePickRequired: Selecciona un país, categoría, idioma o región para la lista pública.
errors.m3uRequired: La URL del M3U es obligatoria.
errors.pathRequired: Indica al menos una ruta de carpeta.

libraries.browseFoldersHint: Selecciona la carpeta donde están los archivos.
libraries.addLibraryHint: Crea una nueva colección. Puedes apuntar a una carpeta local o a un servicio en directo.
libraries.tipNameBody: Aparece en la barra lateral. Cámbialo cuando quieras desde Editar.
libraries.tipTypeBody: Decide cómo se escanean los archivos (películas, series, música) o si es TV en vivo.
libraries.tipPathBody: Apunta a la carpeta dentro del contenedor. Usa el botón Examinar para listarlas.
libraries.tipLiveBody: Pública usa listas de iptv-org. Personalizada acepta tu propio M3U.
libraries.preflightError: No se pudo lanzar la prueba
libraries.tlsInsecureWarn: ⚠ Las descargas de M3U/EPG aceptarán cualquier certificado, incluso caducados o auto-firmados. Sólo activar para providers de confianza con TLS roto. El proxy de streams mantiene verificación estricta.
libraries.tlsInsecureHint: Activar sólo si el provider tiene el certificado caducado o auto-firmado y aceptas el riesgo MITM.

providers.title: Metadata Providers
providers.description: Configure API keys for metadata, artwork, and subtitle providers. After adding a key, rescan your libraries to fetch metadata.
providers.languageHint: Metadata and artwork will be fetched in this language. Rescan libraries after changing.
providers.noProviders: No providers registered. Providers are registered automatically on server startup. Make sure TMDb, Fanart.tv, or OpenSubtitles providers are enabled in the server configuration.
providers.tmdbDescription: The Movie Database — provides metadata, posters, backdrops, cast and crew information for movies and TV shows.
providers.fanartDescription: High-quality fan art, logos, disc art, and additional artwork for movies and TV shows.
providers.opensubsDescription: Subtitles in multiple languages for movies and TV shows.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
users.renameValidation: El nombre no puede estar vacío.
users.pinValidation: El PIN debe ser exactamente 4 dígitos.
users.primaryHint: Cuenta principal del servidor — no se puede eliminar ni cambiar de rol desde aquí.
users.primaryDeleteHint: La cuenta principal no se puede eliminar.
users.ratingHint: Cubre los códigos MPAA (G/PG/PG-13/R/NC-17) y de TV (TV-Y/Y7/G/PG/14/MA) del mismo nivel.
users.addProfileHint: Crear perfil hijo bajo esta cuenta
users.renameHint: Editar el nombre y el color del avatar
users.autoGenerateHint: Te enseñaremos la contraseña una sola vez. El usuario tendrá que cambiarla al iniciar sesión.
users.renameModalHint: Cambia el nombre y el color del avatar. El usuario interno (login) no cambia, así que las contraseñas y permisos siguen igual.
users.avatarColorAutoHint: Color automático según el nombre de usuario.
users.pinModalHint: Escribe un PIN de 4 dígitos o déjalo vacío para quitarlo. El PIN se pide al elegir el perfil en la pantalla de selección.
users.libraryAccessHint: Which libraries this household can see.
users.libraryAccessProfileHint: Edit the household's library access (inherited from the owner).
users.libraryAccessSectionHint: By default, the new user sees every existing library. Uncheck the ones you don't want them to see.
users.libraryAccessInheritedNotice: You are editing the household owner {{owner}}. Every profile under that account inherits the same set.
users.libraryAccessNoLibraries: No libraries created yet. Add one from /admin/libraries and come back here to assign access.

system.title: System Overview
system.baseURLUnset: Not configured — set it below in Settings.
system.hwAccelDisabledPointer: Enable it below in Settings (requires restart).
system.hwAccelNoneHint: No hardware accelerator detected — falling back to libx264.

serverBaseURL.label: Public URL
serverBaseURL.hint: Absolute http(s) URL clients reach the server at. Used for absolute links + CORS.

hwAccelEnabled.label: Hardware acceleration
hwAccelEnabled.hint: Use a GPU encoder when one is detected on the host.

hwAccelPreferred.label: Preferred accelerator
hwAccelPreferred.hint: Auto picks the best available; pin to one to override the detector.

forceDirectPlay.label: Force direct play
forceDirectPlay.hint: Send the file as-is to every client; never transcode. Off by default. Only enable when you're certain every client (browser, TV app, etc.) can decode every codec and container in your library — otherwise playback will fail.

system.cacheEmptyTranscodes: {{path}} — fills the first time something transcodes.
system.singleOptionHint: Solo hay una opción disponible — se aplicará automáticamente.

authKeys.title: Signing keys
authKeys.description: JWT signing keys used for access and refresh tokens. Rotate when you suspect a leak; prune to remove retired keys.
authKeys.rotateConfirmBody: A new primary key will be minted. The current primary stays valid for the overlap window so existing tokens keep working — set 0 to retire it immediately (use only after a confirmed leak).
authKeys.overlapHint: How long the previous primary stays valid for token validation. 300 (5 min) is the safe default.

systemHealth.ffmpegMissingHint: Instala ffmpeg en el host o monta el binario en el contenedor — sin él no hay transcodificación.
systemHealth.title: Estado
systemHealth.subtitle: Comprobaciones rápidas de los componentes que tienen que estar arriba para que HubPlay funcione.

systemConnection.title: Conexión
systemConnection.hint: El servidor escucha en la dirección de abajo y se identifica externamente con la URL pública.

systemStreaming.subtitle: Sesiones de transcodificación activas y backend de aceleración por hardware.

systemSessions.killConfirm: ¿Cerrar la sesión de {{user}}? El cliente volverá a la pantalla anterior.
systemSessions.empty: Nadie está reproduciendo nada ahora mismo.
systemSessions.title: Sesiones activas

systemRuntime.title: Proceso
systemRuntime.subtitle: Memoria que el runtime de Go tiene reservada y goroutines vivas en este momento.
systemRuntime.memAllocHint: Heap de Go en uso (no la RAM total del host).
systemRuntime.memSysHint: Lo que el runtime ha pedido al SO.

systemStorage.subtitle: Espacio que ocupan los caches y la base de datos en disco.

systemSettings.title: Configuración
systemSettings.subtitle: Valores en tiempo de ejecución que se aplican sin reiniciar el servidor.

systemAdvanced.subtitle: Operaciones destructivas y rotación de llaves. Nada que tocar en el día a día.

logs.title: Logs en vivo
logs.subtitle: Últimos eventos del servidor. Útil para diagnosticar fallos sin abrir la consola del contenedor.
logs.empty: No hay entradas todavía. Se mostrarán aquí en cuanto el servidor escriba algo.
logs.pausedHint: Pausado · {{n}} entrada(s) en cola, se aplicarán al reanudar.

backup.restoreConfirm: El backup sustituirá la base de datos actual al reiniciar HubPlay. La copia anterior se guardará al lado con un nombre con fecha. ¿Continuar?
backup.restoreStaged: Backup preparado ({{size}}). Se aplicará al reiniciar HubPlay.
backup.title: Copia de seguridad
backup.subtitle: Descarga una copia consistente de la base de datos o restaura una previa. La restauración se aplica al reiniciar HubPlay; la BD anterior se guarda al lado con marca de tiempo.

withoutEPG.hint: Corrige el tvg-id para emparejarlo con una entrada del XMLTV. La edición se conserva tras refrescar el M3U.
withoutEPG.searchPlaceholder: Buscar por número, nombre o grupo…
withoutEPG.noMatches: Ningún canal coincide con la búsqueda.

epg.priorityHint: Prioridad: la primera fuente gana cuando varias cubren el mismo canal.
epg.empty: Aún no hay fuentes EPG. Añade una del catálogo o pega una URL XMLTV para que la guía aparezca en la app.
epg.listLabel: Fuentes EPG configuradas, en orden de prioridad

health.pendingHint: Pulsa "Actualizar canales" para traer el M3U.
health.noSourcesHint: Los canales funcionan; la guía no aparecerá hasta añadir una fuente.
health.allFailingHint: Revisa las URLs o añade una fuente alternativa.
health.neverRefreshedHint: Pulsa "Actualizar EPG" para cargar la guía.

schedule.title: Tareas automáticas
schedule.description: Refresca el M3U y la guía EPG cada X horas sin intervención.

health.hiddenHint: Ocultos automáticamente de la vista de usuario tras 3 fallos consecutivos. Márcalos como OK cuando los arregles o desactívalos si siguen muertos.
health.searchPlaceholder: Buscar por nombre o motivo del fallo…
health.noMatches: Ningún canal coincide con la búsqueda.
health.resetHint: Borra el contador. Úsalo si sabes que el canal funciona.

account.title: Create Admin Account
account.description: Set up the main administrator account for your server.
account.adminNote: This is the main administrator account. You can create additional users later.
account.displayNameHint: A friendly name shown in the UI
account.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
account.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
account.adminExists: Admin account already exists. Please enter the correct password to continue.
account.autoGenerateHint: Te enseñaremos la contraseña generada al final del asistente para que la copies a tu gestor.

libraries.title: Add Media Libraries
libraries.description: Tell HubPlay where your media files are stored. You can add more libraries later.

settings.title: Server Settings
settings.description: Configure optional settings. All of these can be changed later.
settings.metadataDescription: A TMDb API key enables automatic movie and TV show metadata, posters, and descriptions.
settings.tmdbHint: Free at themoviedb.org — sign up and generate an API key in your account settings.
settings.transcodingDescription: FFmpeg is required for transcoding media to different formats and quality levels.
settings.ffmpegMissing: Transcoding will not be available. Install FFmpeg and restart the server.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.subtitle: Here's a summary of your configuration.
complete.noneAdded: None added — you can add libraries later
complete.scanDescription: This will begin indexing your media files in the background.
complete.generatedPasswordHint: Cópiala ahora a tu gestor de contraseñas. Solo se mostrará una vez. Si la pierdes, tendrás que recuperar la cuenta a mano desde la base de datos.

imageManager.title: Manage Images
imageManager.noExternalIds: No external IDs found. Run a library scan with metadata enabled first.

shortcuts.exit: Salir de pantalla completa o cerrar el reproductor
shortcuts.title: Atajos de teclado
shortcuts.dismissHint: Pulsa ? otra vez o haz clic fuera para cerrar.
